title: Metafield
description: Allows app partners to write custom data to various resources in the API.

id.description: The unique identifier for the metafield.

date_created.description: Date and time of the metafieldʼs creation.

date_modified.description: Date and time when the metafield was last updated.

owner_client_id.description: Client ID for the metafieldʼs creator.
